overview.description: Business Intelligence, data integration and automation consulting for Czech enterprises
overview.description_long: SOFTIM.CZ is a Prague-based IT consultancy that helps companies transform their data operations. Core offerings: Business Intelligence (analytical databases, Power BI dashboards, custom reports), Unitegra (proprietary data integration platform for connecting ERP, CRM, e-shop and WMS systems), Qeedio (24/7 AI-assisted process monitoring and predictive alerting), and Industry 4.0 technological process management. Microsoft partner certified in Azure development and data analytics.
overview.tagline: Transformujeme firmy na vyšší úroveň (We transform companies to a higher level)

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in March 2013 as a small IT services firm specialising in Business Intelligence and data automation.

key_milestones.event: Founded as SOFTIM.CZ spol. s r. o. in Prague
Jan Hnízdil joins as co-director and shareholder
Active across BI, Unitegra, Qeedio, and Industry 4.0 service lines

awards: Microsoft Partner (Azure developer, Data analyst certifications)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: SOFTIM.CZ primarily delivers BI consulting, custom reporting, and data integration services — tasks increasingly automatable by AI copilots embedded in Power BI, Azure, and no-code ETL tools. Their Qeedio monitoring product has some IP value but is thin against larger monitoring SaaS players.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: BI and data integration consulting is a stable and real market in the Czech Republic with steady SME demand. However, the space is competitive from larger system integrators and self-service cloud BI tools that reduce consulting hours.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: SOFTIM.CZ is fully bootstrapped with minimal registered capital (200,000 CZK), no known external funding, and a very small team. Survival depends entirely on client project revenue with no visible financial runway buffer.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: The combination of high AGI displacement risk (commodity BI/integration consulting), bootstrapped with no funding cushion, and a micro-team size makes this company highly vulnerable to market shifts or loss of key clients.

metadata.notes: Small Czech-market BI consulting firm with two proprietary products: Unitegra (data integration platform) and Qeedio (process monitoring). Founded and majority-owned by Karel Hnízdil. CNAIP listing suggests some AI relevance but core offering is primarily data engineering and BI consulting rather than AI-native.
